---
title: "Writing"
toc: false
listing:
  contents: writing
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-banner}

# Writing

<p class="lead">Essays on AI architecture, software engineering, and strategic thinking</p>

:::

<div class="writing-intro">

Short-form thinking on what I'm building, learning, and observing. Not polished takes — working notes from someone who ships products and sits in diligence calls.

</div>
